# Colorado Springs Health Collective (CSHC)

## About
Colorado Springs Health Collective is a multi-specialty healthcare organization based in Colorado Springs, Colorado. We operate three clinics under one roof, designed to work together so patient care is coordinated, not fragmented.

## Our Three Clinics

### CSHC Direct Primary Care
Membership-based primary care at $100/month. Includes unlimited in-person and telehealth visits, same/next-day access, no copays, no surprise bills, and labs and medications at cost. Providers: Logan McOmber, PA-C and Sarah Neff, FNP-C.

### CSHC Hormone Clinic
Dedicated hormone and metabolic care for women (perimenopause, menopause, HRT) and men (TRT, testosterone replacement). Also offers GLP-1 weight loss therapy (semaglutide/Ozempic, tirzepatide/Mounjaro). Initial consult $249, ongoing management $149/month. Perry Academy Perimenopause Certificate (pending).

### CSHC Hyperbaric (Opening Summer 2026)
Colorado Springs' only accessible 2.0 ATA hyperbaric oxygen chamber. Clinic-based, operating at the pressure used in serious HBOT research. Early access waitlist open. Treats: fibromyalgia, Long COVID, wound healing, anti-aging, athletic recovery, autoimmune conditions, brain/neurological recovery.

## Urgent Care (No Membership Required)
Mobile and telehealth urgent care available to anyone. Telehealth: $85. In-home visit: $115. Free for DPC members.

## Location & Contact
- Based in Colorado Springs, Colorado
- Mobile and virtual care — providers come to you
- Phone: (719) 824-4716
- Email: dpc@coshealthcollective.com
- Website: https://coshealthcollective.com

## What We Treat / Specialties
Direct primary care, family medicine, preventive care, hormone optimization, perimenopause, menopause, HRT (hormone replacement therapy), testosterone replacement therapy (TRT), GLP-1 weight loss, semaglutide, tirzepatide, hyperbaric oxygen therapy (HBOT), IV therapy, aesthetics, allergy SLIT therapy, health coaching, precision medicine, remote monitoring.

## Who We Serve
Residents of Colorado Springs and the surrounding Pikes Peak region. DPC and urgent care available statewide via telehealth in Colorado.
